_schema: Named/unique relics with explicit effect IDs. E1/E2/E3 columns from xlsx are mapped to attrs[]. source_type ∈ {remembrance, shop, boss_standard, boss_everdark, boss_dlc, other}.

_source_types.shop: Small Jar Bazaar (Murk) or Collector Signboard
_source_types.boss_standard: First-kill drop from a base Nightlord
_source_types.other: Tutorial / random expedition reward / special event
